message:
feat(runtime,server,store): implement CLIENT PAUSE and fix keyspace notification db index

CLIENT PAUSE (fr-runtime + fr-server):
- Add deadline-based pause expiry with pause mode support (ALL/WRITE)
- Implement is_client_paused() and is_command_paused() helpers for
  deterministic clock-driven pause checking
- Modify handle_client_command() to accept now_ms for testable timing
- Add pause gate in process_buffered_frames() with UNPAUSE exemption
- 3 new tests: basic pause/unpause, write-mode selective blocking,
  server integration

Keyspace notifications (fr-store):
- Fix eviction and expiration notification paths to report the correct
  database index instead of hardcoded 0
- 2 new tests validating correct db index in notification messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
